title: 2024年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What do you want to buy here?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: A winter coat.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Don't you already have one?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Yes, but I want a longer one.
questions.explanation: 「もう持ってるでしょ？」に1の「うん、でも長いのが欲しい」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「長いのが欲しい」→正解。2「やっていいよ」→無関係。3「夏に行った」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: The cafeteria is crowded today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is it OK if I join you?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「一緒にいい？」に3の「もちろん」が適切。
highlights: Is it OK if I join you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「パスタとサラダ」→注文の話。2「窓の横」→場所の話。3「もちろん」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's raining.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. I forgot my umbrella.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Me, too.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 二人とも傘を忘れたので1の「買った方がいいかも」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「買おうか」→正解。2「数分前」→無関係。3「親切ね」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is that banana cake?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. I made it yesterday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Wow. Do you often bake cakes?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「よくケーキ焼くの？」に3の「毎週末」が頻度の答えとして適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「終わったら」→頻度の答えではない。2「半額だった」→買った話ではない。3「毎週末」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Have you been to Italy?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, it's a beautiful country.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm going there this summer.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「今年の夏行くんだ」に2の「きっと気に入るよ」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「それはドイツだった」→無関係。2「気に入るよ」→正解。3「前に見た」→不自然。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Here are some peanuts.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I get you anything else?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Just a cup of coffee, please.
questions.explanation: 「他に何か？」に2の「コーヒーをお願い」が適切。
highlights: Can I get you anything else
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「向かってる」→無関係。2「コーヒーを」→正解。3「シカゴに行った」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to study on Saturday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm busy then.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What about Sunday?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「日曜はどう？」に1の「いいね」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「いいね」→正解。2「楽しかった」→過去形で不自然。3「雪だった」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm going to throw this box away.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, don't do that.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why not?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜダメ？」に1の「また使えるから」が理由として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「また使える」→正解。2「もう送った」→無関係。3「プレゼントをもらった」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When will you come back to Osaka?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Next week.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How is Tokyo?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「東京はどう？」に2の「まだ着いてない」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家が遠い」→不自然。2「まだ着いてない」→正解。3「買ってあげた」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go skiing tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I think I'll be busy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When can we go?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ行ける？」に3の「来週」が時間の答えとして適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「山で」→場所の答え。2「明日8時」→忙しいと言った。3「来週」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you help me? I'm looking for the library.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. Do you know where the swimming pool is?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's between that and City Hall.

questions.question: Where does the woman want to go?
questions.explanation: 「図書館を探している」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ビーチ」→言及なし。2「プール」→目印として使用。3「図書館」→正解。4「市役所」→目印。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How was your vacation?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. I went to Europe for 10 days.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you go to Italy?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, for three days. Then, I went to Spain for a week.

questions.question: How long did the woman stay in Italy?
questions.explanation: 「イタリアに3日間」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1週間」→スペイン。2「3週間」→言及なし。3「3日間」→正解。4「10日間」→ヨーロッパ全体。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Jessica and I are going to a curry restaurant tonight.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want to come?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sorry, I'm going to eat with my grandparents tonight.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 夕食の予定について話している。
highlights: going to a curry restaurant tonight
going to eat with my grandparents tonight
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「夕食の予定」→正解。2「アルバイト」→言及なし。3「ジェシカの祖父母」→男の子の祖父母。4「カレーのレシピ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I fell asleep during the movie.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It was three hours long!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. Movies are usually one and a half or two hours long.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I know.

questions.question: How long was the movie?
questions.explanation: 「3時間もあった！」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1時間半」→通常の長さ。2「2時間」→通常の長さ。3「2時間半」→言及なし。4「3時間」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Jane. It's Tom. I'm looking for my green umbrella. Have you seen it anywhere?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, OK. I'll ask Mike, then.

questions.question: Whose umbrella is lost?
questions.explanation: トムが「自分の緑の傘を探している」。
highlights: I'm looking for my green umbrella
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ジェーン」→聞かれた人。2「マイク」→次に聞く人。3「トム」→正解。4「先生」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How was school, Mindy?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK, Dad. I enjoyed math class.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Then why do you look so sad? You should be happy.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm not sad, but my stomach hurts.

questions.question: How does Mindy feel now?
questions.explanation: 「お腹が痛い」→具合が悪い。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「具合が悪い」→正解。2「悲しい」→悲しくないと否定。3「誇らしい」→言及なし。4「寂しい」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to play tennis on Saturday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It'll rain and snow on Saturday. How about Sunday?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK, but Sunday will be windy. Let's play inside the sports center.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good idea.

questions.question: How will the weather be on Sunday?
questions.explanation: 「日曜は風が強い」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「雨」→土曜。2「雪」→土曜。3「暑い」→言及なし。4「風が強い」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is it 5:15 already?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Actually, it's 5:20. Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Our volleyball practice started five minutes ago.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: The coach will be angry at us!

questions.question: What is the problem?
choices: The boy left something at school.
questions.explanation: 練習が5分前に始まっている＝遅刻。
highlights: Our volleyball practice started five minutes ago
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「練習に遅刻」→正解。2「時計を忘れた」→言及なし。3「試合に負けた」→言及なし。4「忘れ物」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: The Seventeen Kittens will have a concert this weekend.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Should we go to the stadium and buy tickets?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We can order tickets online. It's very convenient.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. Let's use my smartphone.

questions.question: How will they get tickets?
questions.explanation: 「オンラインで注文できる」→インターネット。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「手紙で」→言及なし。2「インターネットで」→正解。3「スタジアムに行く」→オンラインにした。4「コンテストで歌う」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, can I have money for a new video game?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, James.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I ask Dad for some money?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Help your sister with her homework every day. Then, I'll buy the game for you.

questions.question: How can James get the video game?
questions.explanation: 「妹の宿題を手伝えば買ってあげる」。
highlights: Help your sister with her homework
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「仕事をする」→言及なし。2「父に頼む」→母が否定した。3「妹を手伝う」→正解。4「借りる」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mika's friends went ice-skating after school yesterday. Mika couldn't go because she had a dance lesson. If she doesn't get any homework, she'll go ice-skating today.

questions.question: Why didn't Mika go ice-skating yesterday?
choices: She had a lot of homework.
questions.explanation: 「ダンスレッスンがあったから行けなかった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ダンスレッスン」→正解。2「宿題が多い」→今日の条件。3「友達が忙しい」→友達は行った。4「友達が疲れていた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Today is my school's art festival. It's famous. A writer from our city's newspaper will come. He will write a story about the festival for the newspaper.

questions.question: What is the writer going to write about?
questions.explanation: 「フェスティバルについて記事を書く」。
highlights: write a story about the festival
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学校の新聞」→市の新聞。2「学校の文化祭」→正解。3「有名な街」→言及なし。4「有名なアーティスト」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I take the bus to work every morning. But this morning I woke up late, so I missed my bus. I had to get a taxi instead. It was really expensive! Tomorrow I'll get up earlier.

questions.question: What did the man do this morning?
questions.explanation: 「タクシーに乗らなければならなかった」。
highlights: I had to get a taxi instead
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「タクシーに乗った」→正解。2「バスに乗った」→乗り遅れた。3「早起きした」→寝坊した。4「車を買った」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Katherine bought some clothes on the Internet last week. She ordered a sweater and a pair of pants. The pants came today, but the sweater didn't, so she's a little unhappy.

questions.question: Why is Katherine unhappy?
choices: She forgot to order some pants.
Her new clothes were too small.
questions.explanation: 「セーターが届かなかった」から不満。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「パンツを注文し忘れた」→届いた。2「間違った服を買った」→言及なし。3「セーターが届かない」→正解。4「小さすぎた」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Last Sunday, Jacob's father bought a computer. Jacob doesn't use computers often, so this Saturday, his father will teach him. Next week, Jacob will write a letter to his grandfather on the computer.

questions.question: What will Jacob do next week?
questions.explanation: 「来週、パソコンで祖父に手紙を書く」。
highlights: Jacob will write a letter to his grandfather
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「祖父を訪ねる」→手紙を書く。2「学校に行く」→言及なし。3「手紙を書く」→正解。4「パソコンを買う」→父が買った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Takashi got lost on his way to a restaurant. He didn't have his phone, so he couldn't call the restaurant or get a map on the Internet. Finally, he asked for help at a convenience store.

questions.question: What did Takashi do to get to the restaurant?
questions.explanation: 「コンビニで助けを求めた」。
highlights: he asked for help at a convenience store
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ネットを使った」→使えなかった。2「地図を買った」→言及なし。3「レストランに電話」→できなかった。4「助けを求めた」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Last year, Melissa made Christmas cards for her family with her friends. This year, she'll make Christmas cards by hand again. She'll order some special paper and pencils today on the Internet.

questions.question: How did Melissa make Christmas cards last year?
questions.explanation: 「去年は友達と一緒に作った」。
highlights: made Christmas cards for her family with her friends
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ネットで」→今年の注文。2「友達と」→正解。3「パソコンで」→言及なし。4「家族と」→家族のために作った。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Next Monday, a new restaurant called Nina's Pizza will open. They'll give free pizza to customers at 2 p.m. that day. They'll also give children free drink tickets next week.

questions.question: How can people eat at the restaurant for free?
choices: By going there at 2 p.m. on Monday.
By taking their children with them.
questions.explanation: 「月曜の午後2時に無料ピザを配る」。
highlights: give free pizza to customers at 2 p.m. that day
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「月曜2時に行く」→正解。2「特別チケット」→ドリンクチケットは子供向け。3「子供を連れて行く」→言及なし。4「特別なドリンクを注文」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oscar usually drives home from work, but his car is broken. Tomorrow, he'll ride the bus because there aren't any train stations near his office.

questions.question: How will Oscar get home from work tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 「バスに乗る」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「バス」→正解。2「自転車」→言及なし。3「電車」→駅がない。4「車」→壊れている。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mark is a nurse at a hospital. He has worked with many doctors. This year, Mark will work with many new nurses. He'll answer their questions and teach them about his job.

questions.question: What is Mark's job?
questions.explanation: 「マークは病院の看護師」。
highlights: Mark is a nurse at a hospital
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「医者」→一緒に働く。2「英語教師」→言及なし。3「看護師」→正解。4「消防士」→言及なし。
